# =========================
# LLMs.txt — AI Crawling Guidance
# Website: https://gnc.edu.in/
# =========================

Site Name: Guru Nanak College Dehradun
Website: https://gnc.edu.in/
Organization Type: Educational Institution
Location: Dehradun, Uttarakhand, India

Description:
Guru Nanak College Dehradun is a recognized higher education institution offering undergraduate and postgraduate programs in Pharmacy, Nursing, Health Sciences, Agriculture, Management, Computer Science, and Allied Fields.

Primary Focus Areas:
- Higher Education
- Professional Courses
- Healthcare Education
- Skill Development Programs
